description: On this screen we can also get rid of the three bars in the top left to get rid of that whole screen and everything related to it. We don't need that.

results.summary: Removed the Discover hamburger menu and the list layout it opened
results.detailed_description: On Discover, the three bars in the top left only existed to open a list-mode alternate of the same deck (Already played / Now playing / Up next). That whole path is gone. I removed the hamburger toolbar button, the isListMode toggle, and every list-layout helper (listView, listRow, pastClips, upcomingClips, currentIndex). Discover is feed-only now: empty state when there are no clips, otherwise the full-screen vertical player you already use. The centered Discover title stays. No other tabs were touched.
results.identified_issue: The top-left line.3.horizontal button on Discover toggled isListMode, which swapped the TikTok-style feed for a List with Already played / Now playing / Up next sections. Product no longer wants that alternate screen, so the toolbar button, isListMode state, listView, listRow, pastClips, upcomingClips, and the unused currentIndex helper were all deleted. Discover now always shows the vertical feed (or empty state). NavigationStack + principal Discover title remain.
